title: Ella
intro_text: It is 8 PM, and tomorrow morning she leaves to attend college across the country. Her room is still half full of the life she is about to leave behind.
help_text:
Frequently used commands:
{available_commands}
- Tab switches focus between command and transcript
- Up/Down recalls command history when command is focused
- Up/Down scrolls the transcript when transcript is focused
- PageUp/PageDown/Home/End scroll the transcript faster
- ? opens the menu

subtext_notes: Tonight is the last night before Ella leaves to attend college across the country.
